title: [香港加油] 七人欖球奧運亞洲區資格賽

replies.msg:
今個星期六日（23-24/11）喺仁川打資格賽

—————

香港欖球總會今天公佈出戰這週末舉行的奧運亞洲區資格賽之香港男子七人欖球代表隊名單。


亞運會衛冕軍香港隊是賽事的頭號種籽隊伍，他們將與其他8個亞洲地區隊伍爭奪參加奧運的資格。當中，日本為2020奧運主辨國，因此可豁免進行資格賽。在這週末，資格賽勝出的隊伍可直接晉身2020奧運，繼2015年日本隊後，成為第二支獲得奧運會參賽資格的亞洲球隊。
共有9支球隊參加精英系列賽，當中包括中國、中華台北、資格賽主辦國南韓、菲律賓、新加坡及斯里蘭卡，而馬來西亞及阿富汗亦會出戰爭奪出線權。


分組後，香港、中華台北及馬來西亞為第一組；中國、菲律賓及新加坡為第二組；斯里蘭卡、資格賽主辦國南韓及阿富汗則於第三組對戰。
隊伍數量意味著比賽形式與亞洲系列賽有所不同，香港將於第一天進行兩場同組比賽，包括中華台北（香港時間上午11:44）及馬來西亞(香港時間下午2:14)。 第八名至第九名的附加賽將在第一天結束，而第一組的優勝者將與附加賽勝出的隊伍進行八強賽。及後再與第二組及第三組次名勝出的隊伍進行準決賽，勝出者可晉身決賽。

在2019系列賽中，香港屈居日本，僅得第二名。香港隊以今季保持不敗之成績，在這個週末到仁川披上戰衣，跟其他參賽隊伍再次對壘。在擁有豐富經驗的情況下，香港隊教練莊保羅(Paul John) 相信球隊可打出好成績。
莊保羅揀選了14位猛將，再於賽事前夕挑選12位球員出賽，另外還有一名後備以取替受傷球員，這可為選拔時提供更大靈活性，使他們能夠以最佳狀態出戰。

—————

香港男子七人欖球代表隊名單 (14位球員)；2020奧運資格賽 (2019年11月23至24日在南韓仁川比賽) :
禾獲特 (Max WOODWARD) (隊長), 黎萬利 (Ben RIMENE), 丹馬克(Max DENMARK), 李忠斯 (Lee JONES), 高凡迪爾 (Michael COVERDALE), 靴貝特(Liam HERBERT), 蔡紀駿 (James Christie), 李卡度, 姚錦成, 韋兆新 (Russell WEBB), 麥堅力 (Alex MCQUEEN), 湯麥堅 (Tom MCQUEEN), 荷迪 (Jamie HOOD), 史圖戴爾(Hugo STILES)
香港係咪冇人睇七欖

Hong Kong’s rugby teams are no strangers to heartbreak of late; they lost to Ireland in the final of the qualifying portion of the World Series, which took place in April at the Cathay Pacific/HSBC Hong Kong Sevens.
The men’s 15-a-side team lost in a final repechage against Canada to qualify for the 2019 Rugby World Cup in Japan, and the women’s sevens lost to China two weeks ago in Guangzhou in their respective Asia Rugby qualifying tournament. The women will get one last shot to qualify for Tokyo next year in another repechage tournament as well

香港隊真係悲劇

“We just lost composure in sudden death, we had some very good chances to score while we were in their 22. We just needed to keep the ball and building phases but we got a penalty and gave them the ball. Sometimes it just doesn’t go your way.”
Lee said he is still proud of the effort they put forth. “The guys gave 100 per cent in this tournament, so we start tomorrow as a new day. We need to build up again.”

World Rugby, which runs the 10-leg HSBC World Sevens Series, is keen to move away from the one-off qualifying tournament and turn it into a three-event series to give teams more than one chance to attain core status.
The Hong Kong Sevens could potentially be the deciding tournament for such a series depending on World Rugby’s final decision.

姚錦成有無為成場運動發過聲？

Elder statesman in the team Salom Yiu Kam-shing believes the result will make Hong Kong stronger now.
“It's really disappointing, but we still have one more chance to get to the Olympics in June, but it will be tougher.
“I think we really were nervous towards the end, and maybe everyone wanted to be the hero, and we lost our structure a little bit. But this experience provides many lessons, and not just for the young players, to help us learn how to control our emotions when it comes to the crunch, to make adjustments so we keep in control of the game. Today has been a good, but very painful, lesson.
“I think all of the boys played well the whole tournament, we just couldn’t quite finish it at the end. Yes we are sad now, but after a week’s rest, we will be back and ready to compete for a spot in the World Series,” said Yiu.

Cado Lee Ka-to echoed Yiu saying, “There is disappointment for sure, we came into this tournament knowing we had a great chance to get to Tokyo 2020. We lost in the final, and the whole team is sad, but not ‘heartbroken’ as when we get back to Hong Kong, there is nothing left do to but pick ourselves up and immediately begin preparations for the repechage.
“The next six months we have a lot of opportunities like the Hong Kong Sevens to prepare even better and give ourselves every chance. On the pitch, I credit our team for the fight we put up against a very strong team. We tried our best and gave all we had,” added Lee

His absence would be felt in the second half as Hong Kong’s restart game, something that had put opponents under real pressure up to the final, came unstuck without Webb’s ball placement abilities. Ben Rimene came on for Webb and immediately produced a try-saving tackle to keep Hong Kong’s margin intact into the second half.
